results.name: coif
results.description: Close-fitting headwear worn to cover the top, back, and sides of the head.

results.name: coin purse
results.description: A small bag or pouch for carrying coins and other small items

results.name: colonnade
results.description: A series of columns usually connected by a horizontal structure at the top. See also [arcade](arcade-architecture).

results.name: color break
results.description: Cards known to break the modern color pie, granting a color access to something it shouldn't be able to do.

results.name: color-choose-land
results.description: Lands that produce a mana of the color you specified when entering

results.name: color count matters
results.description: Cards that care about how many colors a card has.

results.name: colored pencil (medium)
results.description: Art drawn with colored pencils as a medium.

results.name: color pie
results.description: Depicts the five colors of magic

results.name: columnar jointing
results.description: A geological formation of staggered stone pillars.

results.name: combat arbiter
results.description: Cards that limit how many can attack and/or block in some way.

results.name: combat-neutral damage trigger
results.description: Creature abilities that trigger upon dealing any amount of damage, no matter if it was done in combat or not. Compare and contrast [saboteur](saboteur).

results.name: combat ping
results.description: Cards that deal a small amount of damage during the combat step.

results.name: combat ramp
results.description: Generate mana/more lands by attacking and/or dealing combat damage

results.name: combat timing restriction
results.description: Spells that can only be cast in combat.

results.name: combat trick
results.description: Effects that can be used during combat to help a creature survive, destroy opposing creatures, or deal additional combat damage.

results.name: combustion man
results.description: Combustion-bender assassin hired by Zuko to bring down the Avatar.

results.name: command
results.description: Modal spells where you pick two options out of four

results.name: commander identity matters
results.description: Cards that care about your commander's color identity.

results.name: commander matters
results.description: Cards that care about commander mechanics. See child tags for the specific mechanics being engaged in.

results.name: commander set booster cards
results.description: Card that debuted in a Commander Set but were only obtainable through boosters of the set it was released with.

results.name: commander tax evasion
results.description: Don't pay the {2}, become a tax evader! These effects replace, discount, or eliminate commander tax.

results.name: commander tax matters
results.description: The extra mana paid to recast your commander matters to these cards.

results.name: common target
results.description: Specific subjects just seem to end up as the victims of spells.

results.name: compass rose
results.description: The diagram on a map drawn for orientation.

results.name: compulsive research
results.description: Cards with a function of "draw N cards, then discard 2 unless you discard [type]"

results.name: conditional aura
results.description: Auras that have a different effect depending on what is being enchanted.

results.name: conditional tapland
results.description: Lands that will enter the battlefield tapped or untapped depending on certain conditions.

results.name: cone spell
results.description: Based on Cone of Flame, these are cards with a theme of doing something three times with the values 1, 2, and 3.

results.name: confluence
results.description: Modal spells where you pick three options out of three, with the ability to choose a mode multiple times

results.name: conjure-artifact
results.description: Cards that conjure artifacts.

results.name: conjure-artifact-creature
results.description: Cards that conjure artifact creatures.

results.name: conjure-battle
results.description: Cards that conjure battles.

results.name: conjure-card
results.description: Cards that conjure cards of unknown type or of any type of card.

results.name: conjure-creature
results.description: Cards that conjure creatures.

results.name: conjure-duplicate
results.description: Cards that conjure duplicates instead of named cards or cards from spellbooks.

results.name: conjure-enchantment
results.description: Cards that conjure enchantments.

results.name: conjure-instant
results.description: Cards that conjure instants.

results.name: conjure-named
results.description: Cards that conjure other cards by name.

results.name: conjure-nonland
results.description: Cards that conjure nonland cards.

results.name: conjure-permanent
results.description: Cards that conjure any type of permanent card.

results.name: conjure-planeswalker
results.description: Cards that conjure planeswalkers.

results.name: conjure-random
results.description: Cards that conjure random cards.

results.name: conjurer (ffxiv class)
results.description: The precursor to White Mage in FFXIV. Lore wise, White Mages are essentially impossible to become so characters who might have been that job normally are given the conjurer class

results.name: conjure-sorcery
results.description: Cards that conjure sorceries.

results.name: conjure-spellbook
results.description: Cards that conjure cards from spellbooks.

results.name: conjure-to-battlefield
results.description: Cards that conjure other cards onto the battlefield.

results.name: conjure-to-exile
results.description: Cards that conjure cards into exile.
